subject: Raboot, a bipedal rabbit Pokemon with a red hoodie-like upper body and dark lower body, depicted mid-kick in an urban or outdoor setting
description: A bipedal rabbit Pokemon is captured mid-motion — appearing to jump or execute a kick — against a warm, soft-focus background. The creature has a distinctive appearance: a bright red upper body that resembles a hoodie or jacket with visible seams, contrasted with dark grey-black lower limbs. Its long ears are folded back. The overall silhouette is lanky and athletic, communicating speed and physical agility. The background is indistinct, featuring soft warm tones that suggest an outdoor or semi-urban environment without specific architectural detail.
foreground: bipedal rabbit Pokemon in mid-jump or kicking pose
background: soft-focus warm tones, indistinct outdoor setting
